name: [Negative] High Brokerage Charges
description: Users are expressing frustration and concern about the high brokerage charges on the app, leading to a negative experience and a potential loss of trust. The charges are perceived as excessive compared to other apps, and users are requesting a reduction or a more transparent fee structure.

name: [Negative] High Brokerage Charges
description: Users frequently express dissatisfaction with the high brokerage charges on the platform, which is perceived as a major obstacle for traders.
